Pieter de Hooch

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Interior with Women beside a Linen Cupboard
by Pieter de Hooch
Dutch Golden Age · 1663
A mistress hands folded linens to her maid in a tiled hall, sun striking through an open door behind. De Hooch's subject was always the quiet choreography of households — and the light that moved through them.
Portrait of a Family Playing Music
by Pieter de Hooch
Netherlands · 1663 · oil on canvas
←Gerrit van Honthorst Hopi→
